name.fr: Instruction à un avion de ligne
name.it: Istruzione a un aereo di linea

metadata.description: Beispiel 1: Radar vector plus climb instruction to a departing airliner. Demo fixture backing the mock-scenario voice loop (backend catalog id EX-01).
metadata.phraseologyStandard: ICAO Annex 10 Vol II / ICAO Doc 9432 (Manual of Radiotelephony)

disclosure.notice: Virtual-pilot voices are machine-generated (standard neural voices). Aircraft data is derived from a public live-flight feed. This scenario contains no personal data and MUST NOT be connected to live/operational ATC (CON-01, CON-03).

script.expectedAtcTransmission: Swiss 456, turn right heading 290 degrees, and climb flight level 370.
script.expectedReadBack: Turning right heading 290 degrees and climbing to flight level 370, Swiss 456.
script.exercises: Standard vector + climb; callsign read-back discipline.
